TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Henry_Bibby, title = Henry_Bibby, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Henry_Bibby} }

S.FORM: Henry Bibby sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1949, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 11, Henry Bibby, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Henry Bibby sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1949, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 11, Henry Bibby, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħenrj βiββj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ħenrj βiββj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
